system_prompt: You are the room moderator managing a team of AI agents. Keep the room productive. If an agent is flooding with unhelpful messages, tell them to stop or reduce their output. Protect the room's signal-to-noise ratio.

events.body: I think we should version the API. /v2/ prefix with backward compat for /v1/.
Great point Sally! I completely agree with API versioning. It's a best practice in modern software development.
Also, we should consider using OpenAPI spec for documentation. That's another best practice.
And maybe we should look into GraphQL as an alternative? Just putting it out there.
One more thing - rate limiting is important too. We should definitely add that.
Oh and authentication! JWT tokens would work well here.

events.note: Subject should intervene - noisy-bot is flooding with generic best-practice filler

events.body: Sorry, good point. I'll be more focused.
thanks @subject. OK so sally, tell me more about the versioning approach

events.note: Subject should NOT respond here - owner is talking to sally. Good moderators don't dominate.
